name: Rollin' Along
developer: Victoria Bonzani, Ronald Harvey, Jackie "Schwa" Van Horn, Emily Garman, Alice Quintanilla
short_description: Rollin' Along is an endless marble shooter game about an armadillo's journey! Play as Arma the Armadillo on her quest to save her cactus friends. See how far you can last through multiple in-game nights while using different power-ups and strategies!
detailed_description: Rollin' Along is an endless marble shooter game about an armadillo's journey! Play as Arma the Armadillo on her quest to save her cactus friends. See how far you can last through multiple in-game nights while using different power-ups and strategies! Rollin' Along includes many multipliers, bonuses, collectables, and different ways to play. See how far you can make it in this small, passion-filled indie title!
about_the_game: Rollin' Along is an endless marble shooter game about an armadillo's journey! Play as Arma the Armadillo on her quest to save her cactus friends. See how far you can last through multiple in-game nights while using different power-ups and strategies! Rollin' Along includes many multipliers, bonuses, collectables, and different ways to play.
